meta.intent: Teach the core rule through contrast: thinking is free, but the first valid action releases the held water and makes danger advance.
meta.expectedPath: Tap the visible lower-left A pair at row 4, col 0, watch the first flood row appear, then tap the B pair at row 1, col 2 to pop the side blocker and free the puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player treats the board like static cleanup and misses the authored contrast between planning time and action time.
meta.whatItProves: The player can learn the prototype's defining timing rule through interaction instead of explanation.
meta.notes: The opening A group remains beside the future flood edge, but the board now carries real surrounding material so the rule teach reads as gameplay instead of an empty diagram.
